escalatedRisks.status: CONSOLIDATING — July 2, 2026 09:00。July 1 session $46.833 (0.00%) — second consecutive identical session。DDR4 $74.625 (▲+1.20%) NEW ATH confirms bull market width。DDR3 $12.171 20th acceleration day。$47 breakthrough probability downgraded to ~55%。Tonight's July 2 session third attempt。
escalatedRisks.detail: After 21 consecutive ATH sessions, DDR5 spot has now gone two full sessions without advancing past $46.833。This is the longest consolidation since the bull run began May 20。DDR4's continued acceleration and DDR3's 20-day streak prove the bull market is broadening rather than ending, but the $47 psychological level is proving stronger than expected。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴🔴🔴 NEMIX DDR5-6400/5600 32GB DUAL OOS — 68-day retail anchor SNAPPED。Both SKUs 'Out of Stock — may or may not be restocked' on Newegg。First OOS since tracking began。
escalatedRisks.status: NEW — July 2, 2026 09:00。NEMIX DDR5-6400 32GB $1,488 and DDR5-5600 32GB $1,298 both OOS on Newegg。68 consecutive days of availability ended。Possible causes: (1) genuine demand exceeding supply, (2) product discontinuation, (3) inventory system issue。Requires re-check tomorrow。If persistent, this is a structural signal of retail DDR5 RDIMM tightness escalation。
escalatedRisks.detail: This is the most significant source health change in DDR5 tracking since Day 1。The 32GB DDR5-6400 NEMIX anchor at $1,488 has been verified 97 consecutive times over 68 days。Its simultaneous OOS with the 5600 variant supports the 'demand exceeds supply' hypothesis。
